skill.name: plot-consistency-checker
skill.description: Reviews plot structure, story beats, logic flow, and narrative continuity to identify contradictions, plot holes, pacing issues, or unrealistic elements.
skill.summary: Checks plot logic, continuity, pacing, and character motivation to surface story issues and practical fixes.
skill.author: Amraha-Anwar

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged weak cryptography at SKILL.md line 3, but the line is only descriptive frontmatter. I found no evidence of cryptographic code, scripts, network access, command execution, file operations, or prompt injection in the reviewed skill file.

content.value_statement: Plot issues can weaken reader trust and make revision difficult. This skill reviews story logic, continuity, pacing, and character motivation with practical fixes.
actual_capabilities: Reviews cause-and-effect flow across plot summaries, outlines, and scene lists.
Identifies contradictions in timelines, events, motivations, and world rules.
Flags plot holes, weak transitions, coincidences, and pacing problems.
Suggests corrections for each issue found during the review.
Can format findings in a table with issues, explanations, and proposed fixes.
limitations: Requires enough plot material to evaluate continuity and story logic.
Does not replace human editorial judgment or genre-specific expertise.
Cannot verify facts outside the story unless source context is provided.
May miss subtle thematic issues that are not described in the input.

use_cases.title: Revise a Novel Outline
use_cases.description: Find timeline gaps, weak transitions, and inconsistent motivations before drafting chapters.

use_cases.title: Review a Screenplay Beat Sheet
use_cases.description: Check whether major beats follow clear cause and effect with believable character choices.

use_cases.title: Validate Game Narrative Rules
use_cases.description: Compare quests, factions, abilities, and world rules for continuity before production.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Plot Check
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner review of a short summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this plot summary for contradictions, plot holes, and unclear motivations. Return a table with issue, explanation, and proposed fix.

prompt_templates.title: Chapter Outline Review
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate review of a chapter plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Check this chapter outline for timeline consistency, cause-and-effect flow, pacing, and missing transitions. Suggest specific fixes for each issue.

prompt_templates.title: Character Motivation Audit
prompt_templates.scenario: Focused review of behavior and arcs
prompt_templates.prompt: Review these character arcs and scenes. Identify actions that conflict with stated goals, beliefs, relationships, or prior decisions.

prompt_templates.title: World Rule Consistency Review
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced continuity review for complex settings
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this story against the provided world rules, political rules, magic rules, and timeline. Flag contradictions and propose continuity-preserving revisions.

output_examples.input: A detective loses the key evidence in chapter three, then uses it in chapter five without explanation.
output_examples.output: Issue: Evidence continuity gap. Explanation: The evidence cannot be used after it was lost. Proposed fix: Add a recovery scene or change chapter five evidence.

output_examples.input: A cautious protagonist suddenly trusts the villain after one friendly conversation.
output_examples.output: Issue: Motivation shift is unsupported. Explanation: The choice conflicts with the established cautious personality. Proposed fix: Add leverage, proof, or gradual trust-building scenes.

output_examples.input: A magic system forbids healing, but a side character heals a fatal wound near the ending.
output_examples.output: Issue: World rule contradiction. Explanation: The ending breaks the stated magic limitation. Proposed fix: Redefine the rule earlier or use a non-healing solution.

best_practices: Provide the plot summary, scene order, character goals, and world rules together.
Ask for severity ratings when you need to prioritize revision work.
Review proposed fixes against theme, tone, and genre expectations before applying them.
anti_patterns: Submitting only a single scene and expecting a full continuity review.
Accepting every suggested fix without checking author intent.
Using the skill to judge prose style instead of plot logic and continuity.

faq.question: What material should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide a plot summary, chapter outline, scene list, character arcs, and any world-building rules.

faq.question: Can it review partial drafts?
faq.answer: Yes. It can review partial material, but the findings may be limited by missing context.

faq.question: Does it rewrite my story?
faq.answer: It can suggest fixes and optional rewrites for affected parts when you ask for them.

faq.question: Can it check fantasy or science fiction rules?
faq.answer: Yes. Include the rules for magic, technology, politics, or setting limits in your prompt.

faq.question: Will it find every plot hole?
faq.answer: No. It improves review coverage, but human review is still needed for complex narrative intent.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
